info.description: Backend API written in Golang that handles requests from the frontend.
info.title: UpAgain backend Golang API

get.description: Get a list of all accounts with filters and pagination

200.description: List of accounts and pagination info

get.description: Get total count of accounts and increase since last month
Get details of a specific account

patch.description: Update the password of a specific account

get.description: Get activity statistics for a specific account based on its role

patch.description: Update details of a specific account

get.description: Get a paginated list of all items with optional filters for search, sort, status, material, and category.
Get admin-level statistics for items including counts by status, material, category, and timeframe.

parameters.description: Timeframe filter: today, last_3_days, last_week, last_month, last_year, all
parameters.name: timeframe

get.description: Get a paginated history of all items
Get detailed information for a specific item including photos and owner username.

delete.description: Soft-delete an item (listing or deposit) by its ID. Admin can delete any item; users can only delete their own. Item that is reserved or completed can't be deleted

patch.description: Update the status of an item (pending, approved, refused, deleted, completed). Admin and users only.

get.description: Get a paginated list of pending deposits for admin
Get a paginated list of pending listings for admin
Get counts of pending, approved, and refused for all entity types
Get a list of all containers
Get a list of available containers
Get statistics about container counts (total and active)
Get a single container by its ID

put.description: Update the status of a container. Can't update if status is waiting or occupied.

delete.description: Soft delete a container by its ID

get.description: Get details of a specific deposit

put.description: Update the details of a specific deposit (only by owner or admin)

get.description: Get deposit code of pro and user of the latest transaction for a deposit
get.summary: Get deposit codes for user and/or pro of the latest transaction

patch.description: Change the container of a deposit to a another available container

400.description: Invalid deposit ID or container ID

get.description: Get a list of employees not occupied during a specific time range.
Returns the list of events assigned to a specific employee. Admins can view any employee's schedule; employees can only view their own.
Get list of all events with pagination, search, status and sort filters.

parameters.description: Number of events per page (default all)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Filter by status: pending, approved, refused
parameters.name: status

post.description: Create a new event from the provided multipart form data.

parameters.description: Event category (workshop, conference, meetups, exposition, other)
parameters.name: category

get.description:
Get general stats of events to show in event module's cards. Stats include:
- total events
- new events since last month (30 days)
- upcoming events in next 30 days
- total registrations since last month
- total pending approvals for events

parameters.description: Timeframe filter: today, last_3_days, last_week, last_month, last_year, all
parameters.name: timeframe

get.description: Get list of employees assigned to an event by ID.
Get detailed information about an event by its ID.

post.description: Assign a list of employees to an event by its ID. Replaces existing assignments.

patch.description: Update the status of an event (approve, refuse, cancel, or set to pending).

delete.description: Remove an employee assignment from an event by ID.

put.description: Update the details of an existing event by its ID using multipart form data. Employee can't update event if it's already cancelled and updating will require re-validation from admin. Only admin, creator or assigned employee can edit. Can't update critical fields: start_at, city, street, location_detail, price if event has participants already registered.

parameters.description: List of existing image paths to keep (multiple allowed)
parameters.name: existing_images

parameters.description: New event images to upload (multiple allowed)
parameters.name: new_images

get.description: Returns a paginated list of accounts with their total transaction count and total amount spent. Supports search by username or email.
Returns all invoices (transactions and subscriptions) for a specific account. Admins can access any user's invoices; non-admin users can only access their own.
Returns monthly revenue data grouped by category (subscriptions, commissions, ads, events) for a given year, along with a yearly summary.

parameters.description: Year (defaults to current year, must be between 2000 and 2100)
parameters.name: year

get.description: Check the database connection status
Fetches all admin's activites from the database with pagination and filters.

parameters.description: Search by admin name or item ID
parameters.name: search

get.description: Fetches the details of a specific admin activity.
Get paginated transactions for a specific item (admin/pro/user owner)

post.description: Cancel an active reserved transaction for an item

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific listing item, including city and postal code.

put.description: Update an existing listing item's details and images. If updated by a user, status resets to pending for re-validation. User can only update their own listings.

parameters.description: Item material (wood, metal, textile, glass, plastic, other, mixed)
parameters.name: material

parameters.description: Paths of existing images to keep (multiple allowed)
parameters.name: existing_images

post.description: Authenticate a user and return a JWT token and set a refresh token cookie

get.description: Get a paginated list of all posts with filters for search, category, and sorting.

parameters.description: Sort by (highest_view, lowest_view, most_recent_creation, oldest_creation, highest_like, lowest_like)
parameters.name: sort

post.description: Create a new post with title, content, category, and images.

delete.description: Delete a comment by ID. Admins and employees can delete any comment; users can only delete their own.

get.description: Get general statistics about posts, including total count, new posts, engagement rate, and counts per category.

500.description: Failed to get stats of posts

get.description: Get detailed information about a single post by ID.

put.description: Update an existing post's data and images.

get.description: Get a paginated list of comments for a specific post.

patch.description: Delete a post by ID. Users can only delete their own posts unless they are admin.

get.description: Returns all project steps associated with a specific post.

delete.description: Deletes a specific project step by its ID. Admin only.

400.description: Invalid ID or step not found

post.description: Refresh the JWT token using the refresh token cookie

401.description: No refresh token found or invalid refresh token

400.description: Invalid request body or validation failed

get.description: Get the total CO2 saved and total UpScore
get.summary: Get total CO2 of completed items (bought) and total UpScore
